# Billio

> Billio is a mobile-first scheduling and invoicing app for people who teach, coach, train, tutor, or care for clients one-on-one or in small groups. It replaces spreadsheets and generic invoicing tools with one app to track students/clients, log lessons, and get paid. The word used for a "lesson" throughout the app — Lesson, Session, Event, Appointment, Meeting, or a custom word — is configurable per account in Settings, so the same product reads naturally across very different kinds of practices.

## Product

- [Billio](https://www.mybillioapp.com/): Landing page with the full feature list, plan comparison, and FAQ.
- [About Billio](https://www.mybillioapp.com/about): Company info, mission, and contact.
- [Blog](https://www.mybillioapp.com/blog): Scheduling, billing, and admin advice for coaches, tutors, instructors, and other independent service providers.
- [Sign up](https://www.mybillioapp.com/signup): Create a free account, no credit card required.
- [Log in](https://www.mybillioapp.com/login): Existing customer sign-in.

## What it does

- Schedule one-off, group, and recurring lessons, with both calendar and list views.
- Track per-student contact info, parent/guardian details, notes, and preferences.
- Track billing status per lesson: unbilled, billed, paid, or overdue.
- Generate and send invoices — by email on the Free plan, or email and SMS on Pro — manually or on an automated weekly schedule.
- Built-in lesson timer to track and bill by elapsed time.
- AI Assistant: create, update, and delete lessons and invoices by chatting or speaking naturally.
- Branded, custom PDF invoices, including mileage billing at the national IRS rate.
- Earnings dashboard: revenue totals and paid-vs-unbilled breakdowns.
- Google Calendar sync (currently pending Google's app approval).
- Custom terminology: rename "Lesson" throughout the app to Session, Event, Appointment, Meeting, or any custom word, so the product fits tutoring, coaching, therapy, or childcare businesses equally well.

## Pricing

- Free — $0 forever, no credit card required: up to 5 active students, manual lesson tracking, manual invoice generation, email invoice sending, current-month calendar, recurring lesson scheduling.
- Pro — $9.99/month with a 30-day free trial: unlimited active students, full lesson scheduling, automated invoice generation, automated invoice sending and review, email & SMS invoice sending, text message reminders, weekly billing workflow, unlimited calendar navigation, live lesson timer, earnings dashboard, custom PDF invoice generator, AI Assistant.

## Audience

Solo or small-team service providers who bill by the session, usually managing 5–30 active students or clients from their phone: private coaches, tutors, instructors, teachers, nannies, and therapists.
